issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Export PyTorch model to ONNX with dynamic batch and run CUDA-with-CPU-fallback inference
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knew torch.onnx.export but skipped dynamic_axes and provider ordering; treatment exported with opset_version=17 and dynamic_axes, then created ort.InferenceSession with providers=[CUDAExecutionProvider, CPUExecutionProvider].

scenarios.name: Quantize ONNX model to INT8 and validate the result
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for generic compression suggestions; treatment used quantize_dynamic from onnxruntime.quantization with QuantType.QInt8 and validated via onnx.checker.check_model as documented.
